sportuni-50c-polettes-x16.stl.creator: Santeri Hukari
sportuni-50c-polettes-x16.stl.description: Sheet of 16 token-sized pieces designed to substitute a 50-cent coin (50c) as a 'poletti' for locks that return a key when a 50c coin is inserted. Designed for SportUni customers.

portable-hangboard-12mm-20mm-wood-insert.creator: Santeri Hukari
portable-hangboard-12mm-20mm-wood-insert.description: Portable hangboard optimized for minimal plastic use while maintaining high strength. Includes allocated slots for wooden inserts on the grip surfaces. 12 mm and 20 mm edges.
portable-hangboard-12mm-20mm-wood-insert.intended_use: Portable climbing training hangboard; grips intended to be completed with wooden inserts.
